settings.title: Organization Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your organization, team members, and invitations
settings.defenseModeDescription: Control how the automated defense system responds to detected threats. This affects all alert rules.
settings.autoModeDesc: All rules execute automatically including blocking IPs, quarantining files, and sinkholing domains.
settings.semiAutoModeDesc: Rules detect threats and notify, but destructive actions (block, quarantine, sinkhole) require approval.
settings.manualModeDesc: Rules only generate notifications. All defensive actions must be manually executed by a user.
settings.simulatorDescription: Generate realistic security events to test your automated defense system. Events flow through the alert engine and trigger configured rules.
settings.dataRetentionDescription: Configure how long different types of data are retained before automated cleanup. Cleanup runs daily at midnight.

landing.typewriter1: Analyzing 2.5M+ threats per day across global networks...
landing.typewriter3: Mapping adversary TTPs to MITRE ATT&CK framework...
landing.heroDesc: Enterprise-grade AI-powered security operations center. Real-time threat detection, automated incident response, and comprehensive cyber defense for organizations that cannot afford to be breached.
landing.featuresDesc: Purpose-built security operations platform combining AI analysis with automated defense mechanisms
landing.featureAiDesc: Advanced machine learning models analyze security events in real-time, providing expert-level threat assessment and actionable recommendations.
landing.featureMonitorDesc: Live security event feeds via WebSocket connections, with instant alerting and customizable dashboards for complete situational awareness.
landing.featureDefenseDesc: Automated response playbooks execute countermeasures in milliseconds. IP blocking, asset isolation, file quarantine, and domain sinkholing.
landing.featureMitreDesc: Full tactical heatmap coverage across the MITRE ATT&CK framework. Track adversary techniques and measure detection capabilities.
landing.featureIncidentDesc: Structured incident management workflow from detection to resolution. Forensic timeline analysis and evidence preservation.
landing.featureIntelDesc: Aggregated threat intelligence feeds with IOC correlation. Automatic enrichment and threat scoring for proactive defense.
landing.ctaDesc: Deploy enterprise-grade cybersecurity for your organization. Full SOC capabilities with AI-powered threat detection and automated response.
landing.footerDesc: Enterprise-grade AI-powered cybersecurity platform providing comprehensive security operations center capabilities for businesses and organizations worldwide.
landing.capSectionDesc: 15+ integrated security tools covering endpoint protection, offensive security, network defense, compliance, and threat intelligence — all in one unified platform.
landing.capAgentEdrDesc: Deploy lightweight agents on endpoints for real-time process monitoring, registry persistence detection, and automated threat response.
landing.capAutoProtectDesc: One-click protection activation across all endpoints with automated defense mode, policy enforcement, and continuous monitoring.
landing.capTrojanAnalysisDesc: Deep behavioral analysis with IOC extraction, MITRE ATT&CK heatmap mapping, threat actor attribution, and YARA/Sigma rule generation.
landing.capMobilePentestDesc: OWASP Mobile Top 10 compliance checks, permission analysis, certificate pinning verification, and platform-specific security assessments.
landing.capSslInspectorDesc: Certificate chain validation, protocol version analysis, cipher suite auditing, and expiration monitoring for all your domains.
landing.capDarkWebMonitorDesc: Continuous dark web surveillance for leaked credentials, exposed data, and threat actor mentions targeting your organization.
landing.capEmailAnalyzerDesc: Header analysis, SPF/DKIM/DMARC validation, phishing detection, and malicious attachment scanning for suspicious emails.
landing.capCveDatabaseDesc: Searchable vulnerability database with CVSS scoring, affected product tracking, and automated patch priority recommendations.
landing.capPasswordAuditorDesc: Hash identification, dictionary attack simulation, entropy analysis, and organization-wide password policy compliance checking.
landing.capNetworkMonitorDesc: Real-time infrastructure monitoring with bandwidth analysis, ARP spoofing detection, traffic anomaly alerts, and packet capture.
landing.capThreatIntelDesc: Multi-source threat feeds from AbuseIPDB, OTX, MalwareBazaar, and URLScan with automated IOC correlation and enrichment.
landing.capComplianceDashDesc: Framework mapping for NIST, ISO 27001, PCI-DSS, HIPAA, and SOC 2 with automated evidence collection and gap analysis.
landing.capHoneypotSystemDesc: Deploy decoy services to attract and analyze attacker behavior, capture TTPs, and generate actionable threat intelligence.
landing.capPayloadGenDesc: Create security testing payloads for XSS, SQLi, SSRF, and command injection to validate your application defenses.
landing.capThreatSimDesc: Simulate ransomware, phishing, supply chain, and insider threat scenarios to test your detection and response capabilities.
landing.howSectionDesc: From deployment to automated response in four simple steps.
landing.howDeployDesc: Install the lightweight AegisAI360 agent on your endpoints. Supports Windows, Linux, and macOS.
landing.howMonitorDesc: The agent continuously monitors processes, registry, network connections, and file system changes in real-time.
landing.howDetectDesc: AI-powered analysis identifies threats, maps to MITRE ATT&CK, and generates severity-scored alerts instantly.
landing.howRespondDesc: Automated playbooks execute countermeasures in milliseconds — block IPs, quarantine files, isolate hosts.
landing.trustSectionDesc: Built to meet the strictest security frameworks and compliance standards used by government and enterprise organizations.

public.aboutMissionText: AegisAI360 was founded with a singular purpose: to provide enterprise-grade cybersecurity capabilities to organizations that protect critical infrastructure, business operations, and essential services. We believe that every organization deserves access to the same caliber of cyber defense used by the world's most secure institutions.
public.aboutValueProtectionDesc: Unwavering commitment to defending our clients' digital assets against the most sophisticated cyber threats.
public.aboutValueInnovationDesc: Continuous advancement of AI-powered defense mechanisms to stay ahead of evolving threat landscapes.
public.aboutValueExcellenceDesc: Delivering the highest standard of security operations with precision, reliability, and measurable outcomes.
public.aboutValueIntegrityDesc: Maintaining the highest ethical standards in data handling, threat disclosure, and client relationships.
public.aboutTeamDesc: Built by cybersecurity experts with decades of experience in enterprise cybersecurity. Our team combines deep technical expertise with operational security knowledge to deliver a platform that meets the demands of the most security-conscious organizations.
public.featuresSubtitle: Comprehensive security operations platform engineered for organizations that demand the highest level of cyber defense.
public.pricingSubtitle: Choose the level of protection that matches your operational requirements.
public.pricingStarterDesc: Essential security monitoring for small teams
public.pricingProDesc: Full SOC capabilities for growing security teams
public.pricingEnterpriseDesc: Unlimited security operations for large organizations
public.privacyIntro: AegisAI360 is committed to protecting your privacy. This policy describes how we collect, use, and safeguard your information.
public.privacyCollectText: We collect information you provide directly, such as account registration details, organization information, and security event data processed through our platform. We also collect usage data including log data, device information, and platform interaction metrics.
public.privacyUseText: Your information is used to provide and improve our security services, process and analyze security events, generate threat intelligence, send security alerts and notifications, and maintain platform security and integrity.
public.privacySecurityText: We implement enterprise-grade encryption and security measures to protect your data. All data is encrypted in transit and at rest. Access is strictly controlled through role-based permissions and multi-factor authentication.
public.privacyRetentionText: Security event data is retained according to your subscription plan. You may request deletion of your data at any time, subject to legal and regulatory requirements.
public.privacyThirdPartyText: We may share anonymized threat intelligence data with security partners to improve collective defense capabilities. We do not sell personal information to third parties.
public.privacyRightsText: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. You may also request data portability or restrict processing of your information.
public.privacyContactText: For privacy-related inquiries, contact our Data Protection Officer at privacy@aegisai360.com.
public.termsIntro: By accessing or using the AegisAI360 platform, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service.
public.termsAcceptText: By creating an account or using our services, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these terms and our Privacy Policy.
public.termsServiceText: AegisAI360 provides a cloud-based security operations center platform including threat monitoring, incident response, and security analytics capabilities. Service availability and features vary by subscription plan.
public.termsAccountsText: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials. You must notify us immediately of any unauthorized access. Each user must have a unique account.
public.termsUseText: You agree to use the platform only for lawful security monitoring purposes. You must not use the platform to conduct attacks, unauthorized scanning, or any activity that violates applicable laws.
public.termsIpText: All platform content, features, and functionality are owned by AegisAI360. Your security event data remains your property. You grant us a limited license to process this data for service delivery.
public.termsLiabilityText: AegisAI360 shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages. Our total liability is limited to the amount paid for the service in the preceding 12 months.
public.termsTerminationText: Either party may terminate the agreement with 30 days written notice. We may suspend service immediately for violations of these terms or non-payment.
public.termsLawText: These terms are governed by applicable law. Any disputes shall be resolved through binding arbitration.
public.termsContactText: For questions about these terms, contact legal@aegisai360.com.
public.refundIntro: We stand behind our platform and want you to be fully satisfied with your subscription.
public.refundEligibilityText: You may request a full refund within 14 days of your initial subscription purchase. Refunds are available for annual plans on a pro-rated basis within 30 days.
public.refundProcessText: To request a refund, contact our billing team at billing@aegisai360.com with your account details and reason for the request. We will process eligible refunds within 5-10 business days.
public.refundTimelineText: Approved refunds are processed within 5-10 business days. The refund will be credited to your original payment method.
public.refundExceptionsText: Refunds are not available for accounts that have been terminated for violations of our Terms of Service, or for partial months of service on monthly plans.
public.contactSubtitle: Have a question or need assistance? Our team is ready to help you with any inquiries about the AegisAI360 platform.
public.contactMessagePlaceholder: Describe how we can help you...
public.contactSubmittedDesc: Thank you for reaching out. Our team will respond within 24 hours.
public.faqSubtitle: Find answers to common questions about the AegisAI360 platform, pricing, installation, and security practices.
public.faq_whatIs_a: AegisAI360 is an enterprise-grade AI-powered cybersecurity platform that provides comprehensive threat detection, automated incident response, vulnerability scanning, and security operations center (SOC) capabilities in a single unified dashboard.
public.faq_howWorks_q: How does the AI threat detection work?
public.faq_howWorks_a: Our AI engine analyzes security events in real-time using machine learning models trained on millions of threat indicators. It correlates events across multiple data sources, maps threats to the MITRE ATT&CK framework, and provides automated response recommendations.
public.faq_whoFor_a: AegisAI360 is built for organizations of all sizes that need enterprise-grade security operations — from small businesses needing basic monitoring to large enterprises and government agencies requiring full SOC capabilities with automated defense.
public.faq_freeTrial_q: Is there a free trial available?
public.faq_freeTrial_a: Yes, all new accounts start with a 14-day free trial that includes full access to Professional plan features. No credit card is required to start your trial.
public.faq_pricingPlans_a: We offer three plans: Starter ($9/mo) for basic monitoring with up to 5 users, Professional ($29/mo) for full SOC capabilities with up to 25 users, and Enterprise ($79/mo) for unlimited users and advanced features including custom playbooks and threat intelligence feeds.
public.faq_cancelAnytime_q: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
public.faq_cancelAnytime_a: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time from the Billing settings page. Your access will continue until the end of your current billing period. Refunds are available within 14 days of initial purchase.
public.faq_installAgent_q: How do I install the endpoint agent?
public.faq_installAgent_a: The AegisAI360 endpoint agent can be downloaded from the Protection Center within the platform. It supports Windows, macOS, and Linux. Installation takes less than 2 minutes and the agent automatically connects to your dashboard.
public.faq_agentRequirements_q: What are the system requirements for the agent?
public.faq_agentRequirements_a: The endpoint agent requires minimal resources: 50MB disk space, 64MB RAM, and an internet connection. It supports Windows 10+, macOS 12+, and major Linux distributions (Ubuntu 20.04+, CentOS 8+, Debian 11+).
public.faq_dataSecurity_a: All data is encrypted in transit using TLS 1.3 and at rest using AES-256 encryption. We implement strict access controls, regular security audits, and follow industry best practices for data protection.
public.faq_dataLocation_a: Data is stored in SOC 2 certified data centers with geographic redundancy. Enterprise customers can choose their preferred data region for compliance requirements.
public.faq_gdprCompliant_a: Yes, AegisAI360 is fully GDPR compliant. We provide data processing agreements, support data subject access requests, and implement privacy-by-design principles throughout the platform.
public.faq_apiIntegrations_a: AegisAI360 provides a comprehensive REST API and integrates with popular SIEM tools, ticketing systems (Jira, ServiceNow), communication platforms (Slack, Teams), and threat intelligence feeds (OTX, AbuseIPDB, VirusTotal).
public.faq_complianceFrameworks_a: The platform supports compliance reporting for NIST CSF, ISO 27001, SOC 2, GDPR, PCI-DSS, and HIPAA. Automated compliance checks and audit-ready reports are available on Professional and Enterprise plans.
public.faq_supportChannels_a: Starter plans include community support. Professional plans get priority email and in-app ticket support. Enterprise plans include dedicated support with a named account manager and 24/7 emergency response line.
public.faq_uptime_q: What is the platform uptime guarantee?
public.faq_uptime_a: We maintain a 99.9% uptime SLA for all paid plans. Enterprise customers receive a 99.99% uptime SLA with financial credits for any downtime exceeding the guarantee.
public.faq_customPlaybooks_q: Can I create custom response playbooks?
public.faq_customPlaybooks_a: Yes, the playbook engine allows you to define custom automated response workflows with triggers, conditions, and actions. You can automate IP blocking, host isolation, notification chains, and incident creation based on detected threats.
public.faq_threatIntelFeeds_q: What threat intelligence feeds are included?
public.faq_threatIntelFeeds_a: The platform integrates with multiple threat intelligence sources including AlienVault OTX, AbuseIPDB, MalwareBazaar, URLScan, and Google Safe Browsing. Enterprise plans include access to premium commercial feeds.
public.faq_onPremise_a: On-premise deployment is available for Enterprise plan customers. This includes a dedicated deployment package, installation support, and ongoing maintenance assistance from our engineering team.
public.securitySubtitle: Security is at the core of everything we build. Learn about the measures we take to protect your data and maintain the integrity of our platform.
public.securityOverviewText: AegisAI360 is built with a security-first architecture. Every component undergoes rigorous security review, penetration testing, and continuous monitoring. We follow secure development lifecycle (SDLC) practices and conduct regular third-party security assessments.
public.securityEncryptionTransit: TLS 1.3 encryption for all data in transit between clients, agents, and our platform
public.securityEncryptionRest: AES-256 encryption for all data at rest including security events, configurations, and credentials
public.securityEncryptionKeys: Hardware Security Module (HSM) backed key management with automatic key rotation
public.securityInfraRedundancy: Multi-region deployment with automatic failover and geographic redundancy
public.securityInfraMonitoring: 24/7 infrastructure monitoring with automated anomaly detection and alerting
public.securityInfraBackups: Encrypted daily backups with 30-day retention and point-in-time recovery capability
public.securityInfraDDoS: Enterprise-grade DDoS protection and Web Application Firewall (WAF)
public.securityDisclosureText: We welcome security researchers to report vulnerabilities through our responsible disclosure program. We commit to acknowledging reports within 24 hours and providing updates throughout the remediation process.
public.securityCertSubtitle: Our platform is designed to meet the requirements of major compliance frameworks and industry standards.
public.featAiThreatDesc: Advanced machine learning models analyze security events in real-time, providing expert-level threat assessment, behavioral pattern recognition, and actionable recommendations.
public.featRealtimeMonDesc: Live security event feeds via WebSocket connections with instant alerting, customizable dashboards, and complete situational awareness across your infrastructure.
public.featMitreDesc: Full tactical heatmap coverage across the MITRE ATT&CK framework. Track adversary techniques, measure detection gaps, and prioritize defensive improvements.
public.featThreatIntelDesc: Multi-source threat intelligence from AbuseIPDB, OTX AlienVault, MalwareBazaar, Google Safe Browsing, and URLScan with automated IOC correlation.
public.featDarkWebDesc: Continuous surveillance of dark web marketplaces, forums, and paste sites for leaked credentials, exposed data, and threat actor mentions.
public.featThreatSimDesc: Simulate ransomware, phishing, supply chain attacks, insider threats, and zero-day exploits to validate detection and response capabilities.
public.featVulnScanDesc: Comprehensive web application scanning with OWASP Top 10 mapping, CWE identification, CVSS risk scoring, and detailed remediation guidance.
public.featMobilePentestDesc: OWASP Mobile Top 10 compliance checks including insecure storage, authentication flaws, certificate pinning, and platform-specific security assessments.
public.featPayloadGenDesc: Generate security testing payloads for XSS, SQL injection, SSRF, command injection, and other common vulnerability classes to validate defenses.
public.featSslDesc: Certificate chain validation, protocol version analysis, cipher suite auditing, HSTS verification, and expiration monitoring for all domains.
public.featPasswordDesc: Hash identification and cracking simulation, entropy analysis, password policy compliance checking, and organizational credential hygiene assessments.
public.featEmailDesc: Comprehensive email header analysis with SPF/DKIM/DMARC validation, phishing indicator detection, and malicious attachment identification.
public.featEdrDesc: Lightweight endpoint agents with real-time process monitoring, registry persistence detection, DLL sideloading checks, and PowerShell script analysis.
public.featAutoProtectDesc: One-click protection activation across all endpoints with automated defense mode, real-time policy enforcement, and continuous threat scanning.
public.featAutoResponseDesc: Automated response playbooks execute countermeasures in milliseconds — IP blocking, asset isolation, file quarantine, and domain sinkholing.
public.featIncidentDesc: Structured incident workflow from detection to resolution with forensic timeline, evidence preservation, team assignment, and post-incident reporting.
public.featInfraMonDesc: Real-time network infrastructure monitoring with bandwidth analysis, ARP spoofing detection, traffic anomaly alerts, and deep packet inspection.
public.featNetworkMapDesc: Visual network asset inventory with risk assessment, connectivity mapping, and real-time status monitoring for all infrastructure components.
public.featComplianceDesc: Multi-framework compliance mapping for NIST CSF, ISO 27001, PCI-DSS, HIPAA, and SOC 2 with automated evidence collection and continuous gap analysis.
public.featCveDesc: Searchable vulnerability database with CVSS scoring, affected product tracking, exploit availability indicators, and automated patch priority recommendations.
public.featTrojanDesc: Deep behavioral analysis with automated IOC extraction, MITRE ATT&CK heatmap visualization, threat actor attribution, and YARA/Sigma rule generation.
public.featForensicDesc: Comprehensive audit logging and chronological event reconstruction for incident investigation, compliance auditing, and post-breach analysis.

public.planFeatTrojanFull: Trojan analyzer with IOC extraction & MITRE heatmap

scanner.title: Security Scanner
scanner.subtitle: Scan targets for vulnerabilities, open ports, DNS records, SSL certificates, and security headers
scanner.subject: Subject
scanner.blockPortExplanation: Creates a firewall rule to block port {{port}}. This prevents external access through this port.
scanner.portRiskExplanation: Port {{port}} ({{service}}) is open and could be exploited
scanner.portRiskWhy: Open {{service}} ports can allow unauthorized access to your systems. Blocking unused ports reduces your attack surface.
scanner.blockPathExplanation: Creates a firewall rule and alert to block access to {{path}}. This protects sensitive files from being accessed.
scanner.vulnPathWhy: Exposed {{name}} can reveal sensitive configuration, credentials, or allow unauthorized access to admin tools.
scanner.monitorSSLExplanation: Creates an alert rule that will notify you when this SSL certificate is about to expire.
scanner.sslExpiredWhy: An expired certificate means your site is no longer secure. Visitors will see security warnings and their data could be intercepted.
scanner.sslExpiringExplanation: Your SSL certificate expires in {{days}} days
scanner.sslExpiringWhy: Your certificate is about to expire. Set up monitoring to be reminded before it goes down.
scanner.sslSelfSignedWhy: Self-signed certificates are not trusted by browsers. Visitors will see a security warning before accessing your site.
scanner.headerWhyImportant: This header provides {{description}} protection. Adding it to your server configuration will improve security.
scanner.subdomainWhatThisMeans: These are publicly accessible subdomains of your domain. Subdomains like admin, staging, or dev may expose sensitive services.
scanner.dirWhatThisMeans: These paths were found accessible on your server. Exposed admin panels, config files, or backup files can be exploited by attackers.
scanner.techWhatThisMeans: These technologies were detected running on the target. Knowing the tech stack helps identify version-specific vulnerabilities.
scanner.wafWhatThisMeans: A Web Application Firewall (WAF) protects the target from common attacks. This is generally a good security measure.
scanner.noWafDetected: No WAF detected. The target may be unprotected against common web attacks.
scanner.whoisWhatThisMeans: WHOIS data reveals domain ownership and registration details. This information is useful for investigating suspicious domains.
scanner.sqliWhatThisMeans: SQL injection allows attackers to manipulate database queries. This can lead to data theft, unauthorized access, or complete database compromise.
scanner.noSqliFound: No SQL injection vulnerabilities detected. Your application appears safe from basic SQLi attacks.
scanner.sqliRemediation: Use parameterized queries or prepared statements. Never concatenate user input into SQL queries.
scanner.xssWhatThisMeans: Cross-site scripting (XSS) allows attackers to inject malicious scripts into web pages viewed by other users. This can steal cookies, session tokens, or redirect users.
scanner.noXssFound: No XSS vulnerabilities detected. Your application appears safe from basic reflected XSS attacks.
scanner.xssRemediation: Encode all user input before rendering in HTML. Use Content-Security-Policy headers to prevent inline script execution.

downloadAgent.title: Deploy Endpoint Agent
downloadAgent.subtitle: Download the agent, generate a token, and deploy it on your endpoints
downloadAgent.step1Desc: Download the pre-compiled agent for your operating system
downloadAgent.step2Desc: Each agent needs a unique device token to register with the platform
downloadAgent.step3Desc: Choose your preferred method to start the agent
downloadAgent.optionADesc: Right-click the downloaded AegisAI360-Agent.exe file and select "Run as administrator". The agent will launch an interactive setup wizard where you can enter your server URL and device token. Your configuration will be saved automatically for future runs.
downloadAgent.optionANote: Administrator privileges are required for full functionality (WiFi control, firewall, services, process management). The agent will auto-request elevation via UAC if not run as admin.
downloadAgent.optionCTitle: Option C: Install as Windows Service
downloadAgent.optionCDesc: For production deployments, install the agent as a Windows service so it runs persistently in the background. The service starts automatically on boot, and is configured with auto-restart recovery (5-second delay on failure). Even if the terminal or PowerShell session is closed, the agent continues running and monitoring your system.
downloadAgent.whatHappens: What happens when the agent connects:
downloadAgent.connectStep1: The agent registers with AegisAI360 using the device token (one-time use)
downloadAgent.connectStep2: It starts sending heartbeats with CPU/RAM metrics every 30 seconds
downloadAgent.connectStep3: It sends full system telemetry (disk, processes, network, run mode) every 30 seconds
downloadAgent.connectStep4: It polls for remote commands from the dashboard every 5 seconds
downloadAgent.connectStep5: It checks for agent updates every 5 minutes with SHA256 verification
downloadAgent.connectStep6: It runs continuous background monitoring (process watchlist, file integrity, network connections)
downloadAgent.connectStep7: If disconnected, it automatically retries with exponential backoff
downloadAgent.connectStep8: Your endpoint will appear in the dashboard within seconds
downloadAgent.servicePersistenceDesc: When installed as a Windows Service, the agent runs as a background process under LocalSystem and survives terminal/PowerShell closure. The service is configured with delayed auto-start (starts on boot) and automatic recovery (restarts within 5 seconds on failure). The dashboard shows each agent's run mode (Service, Tray, or Terminal) so you can verify deployment status.
downloadAgent.configFileDesc: The agent saves its configuration to config.json in the same folder as the .exe. You can also create or edit this file manually:

feat.radarDesc: Real-time threat visualization with continuous perimeter scanning
feat.aiThreatDesc: Advanced machine learning models analyze security events in real-time, providing expert-level threat assessment, behavioral pattern recognition, and actionable recommendations.
feat.realtimeDesc: Live security event feeds via WebSocket connections with instant alerting, customizable dashboards, and complete situational awareness across your infrastructure.
feat.mitreDesc: Full tactical heatmap coverage across the MITRE ATT&CK framework. Track adversary techniques, measure detection gaps, and prioritize defensive improvements.
feat.intelDesc: Multi-source threat intelligence from AbuseIPDB, OTX AlienVault, MalwareBazaar, Google Safe Browsing, and URLScan with automated IOC correlation.
feat.darkwebDesc: Continuous surveillance of dark web marketplaces, forums, and paste sites for leaked credentials, exposed data, and threat actor mentions.
feat.simDesc: Simulate ransomware, phishing, supply chain attacks, insider threats, and zero-day exploits to validate detection and response capabilities.
feat.vulnScanDesc: Comprehensive web application scanning with OWASP Top 10 mapping, CWE identification, CVSS risk scoring, and detailed remediation guidance.
feat.mobilePentestDesc: OWASP Mobile Top 10 compliance checks including insecure storage, authentication flaws, certificate pinning, and platform-specific security assessments.
feat.payloadDesc: Generate security testing payloads for XSS, SQL injection, SSRF, command injection, and other common vulnerability classes to validate defenses.
feat.sslDesc: Certificate chain validation, protocol version analysis, cipher suite auditing, HSTS verification, and expiration monitoring for all domains.
feat.passwordDesc: Hash identification and cracking simulation, entropy analysis, password policy compliance checking, and organizational credential hygiene assessments.
feat.emailDesc: Comprehensive email header analysis with SPF/DKIM/DMARC validation, phishing indicator detection, and malicious attachment identification.
feat.edrDesc: Lightweight endpoint agents with real-time process monitoring, registry persistence detection, DLL sideloading checks, and PowerShell script analysis.
feat.autoProtDesc: One-click protection activation across all endpoints with automated defense mode, real-time policy enforcement, and continuous threat scanning.
feat.autoRespDesc: Automated response playbooks execute countermeasures in milliseconds — IP blocking, asset isolation, file quarantine, and domain sinkholing.
feat.incidentDesc: Structured incident workflow from detection to resolution with forensic timeline, evidence preservation, team assignment, and post-incident reporting.
feat.infraDesc: Real-time network infrastructure monitoring with bandwidth analysis, ARP spoofing detection, traffic anomaly alerts, and deep packet inspection.
feat.topoDesc: Visual network asset inventory with risk assessment, connectivity mapping, and real-time status monitoring for all infrastructure components.
feat.complianceDesc: Multi-framework compliance mapping for NIST CSF, ISO 27001, PCI-DSS, HIPAA, and SOC 2 with automated evidence collection and continuous gap analysis.
feat.cveDesc: Searchable vulnerability database with CVSS scoring, affected product tracking, exploit availability indicators, and automated patch priority recommendations.
feat.trojanDesc: Deep behavioral analysis with automated IOC extraction, MITRE ATT&CK heatmap visualization, threat actor attribution, and YARA/Sigma rule generation.
feat.forensicDesc: Comprehensive audit logging and chronological event reconstruction for incident investigation, compliance auditing, and post-breach analysis.

pricing.comparisonDesc: See exactly what's included in each plan
pricing.eCompDash5: Compliance dashboard (NIST, ISO, PCI, HIPAA, SOC 2)
pricing.eTrojanFull: Trojan analyzer with IOC extraction & MITRE heatmap
